items.title: H.B. Fuller (FUL): Assessing Valuation as MedTech Leader Celine Martin Joins Board to Drive Strategic Growth
items.description: H.B. Fuller (FUL) just announced that Celine Martin will join its Board of Directors in December. She brings three decades of MedTech experience from Johnson & Johnson. This move supports the company’s ongoing push into higher-growth, higher-margin medical markets. See our latest analysis for H.B. Fuller. While H.B. Fuller has been making strategic moves, such as welcoming an experienced MedTech leader to its board, presenting at industry events, and continuing regular dividends, the 1-year...

items.title: Stocks dip as government shutdown continues, rare earths rally: What to watch this week
items.description: The stock market will enter the second full week of the government shutdown. Investors will also focus on big bank earnings.
